column4: #Return Channel
#Event Description
Strobe beacon (1 / 90s) - PRESS 1: show-live beacon; then start the music on the phone
Nothing But Balls #1 (100 / 35s) - PRESS 2 AT MIX 0:06 (2s before the first lyric): paired wall + starts the automated clock
Nothing But Balls #2 (100 / 35s) - paired wall fires with your press
American Eagle (170 / 35s) - LOW R/W/B fan ON AK chorus 1 (0:39)
Leviathan (16 / 25s) - high+low breaks bridge to the chorus-2 burst
Mortars 4x4 (16 / 105s) - 3-shell BURST ~1:42 on AK chorus 2 then simmer to ~3:23
Neon Swarm (16 / 23s) - LOW swarm with the chorus-2 burst
Rainbow Crush (45 / 31s) - color over the OIA verse (4x4 simmer under)
The Duel (200 / 41s) - R/B anchor ON OIA chorus 2 (3:17.5)
Mortars 3x6 fan (18 / 40s) - opening TRIPLE ~3:58.8 on final choruses; fan wall to ~4:33
Black Panther (12 / 40s) - CAKE ANCHOR ON final choruses (3:58.8); HIGH breaks under the fan wall
Nuclear Rain (36 / 50s) - STANDALONE FEATURE 4:20-5:10: green fallout owns the ring-down and hangs into ALL ABOARD
Zeus (70 / 35s) - mines and breaks rip ON ALL ABOARD (4:52.1)
Captain Marvel (12 / 40s) - whistle tails to crowns through the verse
Juggernaut (22 / 37s) - gold brocade ON CT chorus hook (6:06)
Wild Willow (25 / 42s) - willows bridge the cut and gap into the false finale
Neon Pearls #1 (100 / 39s) - PAIRED low fan wall at the Thunderstruck chants
Neon Pearls #2 (100 / 39s) - paired wall opposite station
Mortars 1x21 bed (21 / 101s) - crown under the whole build; breaks ~7:30.5-9:07
War Cry (56 / 34s) - fanning whistles SCREAM under the build (7:50-8:24)
Magical Neon Willow (26 / 48s) - willows over the 8:05/8:19 build hits
God of Thunder (23 / 23s) - name-match ON the 8:05.2 build hit
Insurgent (16 / 24s) - loud breaks ON the 8:19.2 build hit
Mortars 3x7 fan (21 / 39s) - CROWN barrage over the climax; triples 8:33.5-9:07 die with the bed
WOW! (49 / 40s) - false-finale peak; DIES AT 9:13 with the fade
Bad Ass Brocade #1 (83 / 43s) - DIRECTIONAL SET fired together at 9:49.75; wall dies 10:32.75 ON the final chord
Bad Ass Brocade #2 (83 / 43s) - directional set center
Bad Ass Brocade #3 (83 / 43s) - directional set; dies with the chord as the 1x9 takes over
Mortars 1x9 (9 / 9s) - EXCLAMATION: all nine ON the final chord 10:32.8
